title: Dell SE2726D 27" QHD 144Hz IPS Monitor $149 (Was $299) + Delivery ($0 C&C/ in-Store) @ The Good Guys
body:
Deal: Dell SE2726D 27" QHD 144Hz IPS Monitor $149 (Was $299) + Delivery ($0 C&C/ in-Store) @ The Good Guys

[leeroys_dad] Screening post…
Plus one for dad joke.
Leroy would like it
[sonic2011] where did you get $15 off? I tried click and collect price still the same $149
[Brucius] Its on their homepage, automatically applied to cart when click and collect selected and cart value is > $150.
[chutibuti] https://www.jbhifi.com.au/products/dell-se2726h-27-full-hd-1…
[Trance N Dance] That one is 1080p FHD (model SE2726H)
You want model SE2726D which is 1440p QHD.
[Trance N Dance] For those looking to bump the price over $150, look at the banner up top and find clearance deals under the deals tab. Sort by price lowest to highest and select the calculator or cable manager for $4.
[BB9000] Thanks, after all voucher/gift cards, bought 2 for $251.17
[FriedChickenBoy] Where are people getting vouchers/gift cards from?
[Brucius] There’s been some “online wallet” deals where you get store credit for certain purchases with the Good Guys, I believe that’s the most common one.
[noren7] Beware that this is a non-height adjust stand :(( BUT there's VESA holes for all your mounting needs
[UncleRico] Outstanding…. A(nother) monitor and pink phone grip for $135 minus cashback.
Well worth the wait for a capital first post, OP. Thanks!
[tasc] Wow there's no stock in Perth seems like, have to drive 150km to get a C&C.
[Golazo] Lucky you.
For me, in Sydney:
No stores can be found within 500km of the delivery location. Please try a different postcode/suburb.
[UncleRico] Penrith, Marsden Park, Tuggerah and Castle Hill all showing as in stock in Sydney for C&C as of 10.30pm…
[Golazo] THANK YOU!!!!!
I had my postcode saved but not a store and just assumed I could only get delivery from whoop whoop.
Cheers.
[UncleRico] @Golazo: Nice work. May your pixels all be bright…
[sqheaven] Can the two monitors be written off straight away?
[UncleRico] I suppose they could be if you drop them on your way out the door…
[sqheaven] Buy now, think later. Turns out I had like $35 sitting in PayPal for no reason lol
I'll figure it out, no thanks
[UncleRico] Don’t mention it. To the swift go the spoils…
[Savealopoulos] Great find, got 2 for the home orifice before tax time.
[tone212] No C&C available in metro Melbourne, so can't access the $15 off :(
[1ozbargainer] nearest place for me in qld 40 minute drive, ig ill wait for it to come again
